topic: ChatGPT prompting strategies and real-world use cases

entries.a: A curated collection of prompt examples for AI chat models.

entries.q: What types of AI models does prompts.chat support?
entries.a: Prompts.chat works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and more.

entries.q: How can I contribute to prompts.chat?
entries.a: You can add prompts at prompts.chat/prompts/new, and they will sync automatically.

entries.q: What is the Interactive Book of Prompting?
entries.a: A free, interactive guide with 25+ chapters covering prompt engineering basics to advanced techniques.
An interactive, game-based adventure to teach children how to communicate with AI through fun puzzles and stories.

entries.q: Can I self-host my own private prompt library?
entries.a: Yes, you can deploy your own private prompt library with custom branding, themes, and authentication using prompts.chat.
Prompts.chat supports integrations with CLI, Claude Code Plugin, and MCP Server.

entries.q: How can I access the prompts.chat API?
entries.a: You can access the prompts.chat API through the MCP server or by using the CLI command 'npx prompts.chat'.
